history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a messaging interface with a blurred dark background and a comment box containing Indonesian text.

Main Subject:
A mobile chat/message menu overlays the screen, including a speech-bubble style text input area near the middle-left and a dropdown-style options panel beneath it with multiple selectable lines.

Setting:
The background is dark and heavily blurred with soft, out-of-focus light spots. The interface elements are arranged as part of a smartphone screen, with a status bar at the top showing the time and battery indicator.

Visual Details:
At the top edge, there is a status bar with a Wi-Fi icon, a signal icon, the time “07.46,” and a battery indicator showing “70%.” In the middle-left, a dark rounded chat bubble contains the text “Emg lu sejago itu kh?👑🐒.” Above or alongside it, there is a horizontal row of circular reaction/emoticon icons including a blue face with a sweat drop, a blue face with teeth, a smiling yellow face with teeth, a white heart, a red heart, a yellow smiling face, and a “+” at the far right. Below, a dark rounded options panel contains several rows of text in white with corresponding icons to the right; one line is highlighted in red. The panel includes icons such as a star outline, a thumbs-down-like arrow, a curved arrow, a copy/document icon, and a trash can icon for the highlighted action. The camera perspective is directly facing the screen, typical of a smartphone screenshot.

Visible Text:
07.46
70%
Emg lu sejago itu kh?👑🐒
Beri Bintang
Balas
Teruskan
Salin
Hapus
Lainnya...

Practical Summary:
The image is a phone screenshot of a chat interface with a message bubble and a reaction/emoticon strip. A menu of actions (like replying, forwarding, copying, and deleting) is shown over a blurred dark background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
